text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I OBJECT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deceived by the polite knock at the door, I
quickly learn it has come from none other than
Curren Chan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This cutesy Umamusume is Admire Vega's
roommate. And the second she's entered the
room, she announces her disapproval.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Obviously this is about Ayabe's training schedule,
duh!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You and I both probably know how serious Ayabe
is about running, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Did you know she rejects my invites to eat
together four out of five times?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And whenever I ask her why, she always says it's
because she wants to do some extra training.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, now with her current training schedule, it's
gotten even worse! Every day! Every single day
she leaves before I wake up and gets back after I
go to sleep!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Even on the weekends! I mean, seriously! The list
of videos I want to show her is getting way too
long.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't you think you're being too tough with her?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn pale upon hearing this. I knew she was really
motivated for the Hopeful Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can't believe she's been pushing herself to
do extra training on her own, on top of the
difficult regimen we've been doing together.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know, it doesn't surprise me she's never said
anything.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ayabe's waaay too tenacious for her own good.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's a good thing I came then, right? You'll take care of it, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You are her trainer, after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, now it's clear that Admire Vega has been
overexerting herself. I need to get her to take it
easy a little.
choice_data_list: I wonder what would help her relax...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back on my experiences with her, although
there isn't much to reflect on... Luckily, something
comes to mind.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You want to go to the planetarium?
choice_data_list: They just had a big reopening recently.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Where is this coming from?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without revealing what Curren Chan told me, I
politely express my concerns that she might be
feeling overworked as of late.
choice_data_list:
I think you should take some time to relax so
you can keep up your current pace.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't think this is the right time to relax—
choice_data_list:
Why don't you take a look to see if you're
interested?

Why don't you take a look to see if you're
interested?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I send Admire Vega a link to the planetarium's
website through the LANE messaging app.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a sigh, she takes out her smartphone and we
look at the site together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the planetarium's renovations, they've
added a state-of-the-art projector and large
cushion seats that they claim are "as comfortable
as sitting on a cloud."
choice_data_list:
I figured I might as well reserve cushioned seats
too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You mean you already bought tickets?
choice_data_list: It seemed like they might sell out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, since then, the tickets have been fully
booked.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe this is all a bit too abrupt for her... I tell
her to forget about the tickets and decide
whether she wants to go.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I won't do it at the expense of training.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But if we finish up a little earlier than usual...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It wouldn't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Great! My plan to get Admire Vega to try and
relax worked out!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: These are the cushioned seats...
choice_data_list: We can even lie down while watching.
We can even lie down while watching.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So it seems.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's made of velour...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And inside is... yep—microbeads.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's so soft...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Almost... like a fluffy cloud...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the train back to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You asleep?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Are you asleep?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised by her sudden question. But she
doesn't seem to be looking my way as she asks it
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Perhaps that means she wants me to be asleep. I decide to remain silent and close my eyes once more.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Seems like you're asleep. Good.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You're a difficult person to understand, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I hardly ever talk to you. So you shouldn't really
know anything about me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's something like... a lingering shadow inside
me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The shadow is my sister—I told you about her
before—the one who died instead of me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
My heart beats in excitement when I race. When I
win, I'm overwhelmed with joy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It makes me think that... she would have really
loved to run.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's why...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I want to run and win... because she wanted to but
couldn't.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I want to devote everything I can to the fragment
of her that lives on inside me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't have anything to do with you,
though... It's not a burden you need to bear.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So... that's why I'm telling you while you're asleep.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to training tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my eyes still closed, she remains silent for a
moment as the train continues into the night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to "wake up" as we approach the station
closest to the school.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister
text_block_list.text: So... that's my sister's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... The weather's so nice today.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Ayabe?! You're still here.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Good morning... Is it a problem that I am?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No problem at all! It's just... you're always already
out training by now!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You've got your uniform on... Are you actually
planning to skip running and go straight to class?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I guess so.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Come on... Don't make this awkward for me...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, okay, let's head to class together then! ♪
Hang on just a sec, I'll be ready soon!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm not waiting.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yes you are! I'm gonna get ready in front of the
door so you can't leave.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Cut it out... What if someone tries to open the
door?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Five minutes. I won't wait any longer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Kaaay! ♪
